hook.text: OLE GUNNAR EYES A PREMIER LEAGUE RETURN

beats.text: BBC REPORT OLE AS LEADING IPSWICH MANAGER CANDIDATE
OLE WAS SACKED BY BESIKTAS AFTER NINE MONTHS
MCKENNA WAS HIS UNITED ASSISTANT BEFORE LEADING IPSWICH

caption: Ole's back in the picture 🔴 BBC Sport's Simon Stone reports Ole Gunnar Solskjaer is one of the leading candidates to become Ipswich Town's next manager — the Premier League club now searching for a successor to Kieran McKenna. OGS was sacked by Besiktas after nine months in Turkey. And the connection to Ipswich runs deep: McKenna was Ole's assistant at Old Trafford before building his own managerial career. Think Ole could make it work? 👇 REPORTED — per BBC Sport / Simon Stone. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #solskjaer #ipswich
